works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 1 tossups and 10 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: The landscape of a painting by this artist is interpolated over Sandro Botticelli's face in a contemporary painting by Iranian artist Aydin Aghdashloo .
examples: The landscape of a painting by this artist is interpolated over Sandro Botticelli's face in a contemporary painting by Iranian artist Aydin Aghdashloo .

clues.clue: Adolfo Venturi challenged the usual attribution of a painting by this artist since it lacked the "sweet" character of this artist, instead crediting it to his brother Davide .
examples: Adolfo Venturi challenged the usual attribution of a painting by this artist since it lacked the "sweet" character of this artist, instead crediting it to his brother Davide .

clues.clue: In a painting by this artist, one of the title characters, who is possibly modeled on the artist Francesco Sassetti, wears a chaperon (*) hood and a fur-lined robe.
examples: In a painting by this artist, one of the title characters, who is possibly modeled on the artist Francesco Sassetti, wears a chaperon (*) hood and a fur-lined robe.

clues.clue: In that painting by this artist, the other title character is depicted with long hair flowing out of his doublet hat, gazing at a man who is likely Giovanni Tornabuoni , who commissioned this artist to decorate a chapel.
examples: In that painting by this artist, the other title character is depicted with long hair flowing out of his doublet hat, gazing at a man who is likely Giovanni Tornabuoni , who commissioned this artist to decorate a chapel.

clues.clue: This artist employed the three-quarters perspective to gracefully depict a man with a nasal deformity in Portrait of an Old Man and His Grandson.
examples: This artist employed the three-quarters perspective to gracefully depict a man with a nasal deformity in Portrait of an Old Man and His Grandson.
